data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Perlis & Kedah, Western Sarawak and Western Sabah and Labuan, Eastern Sabah until 3:00AM; Friday, 26 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Perlis & Kedah, Sarawak Barat dan Sabah Barat dan Labuan, Sabah Timur sehingga 3:00 pagi; Jumaat, 26 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Phuket, Northern Straits of Melaka, Samui, southern part of Condore, southern part of Bunguran, northeastern part of Reef North, Layang-Layang, Labuan and Palawan until 3:00AM; Friday, 26 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket, Selat Melaka Utara, Samui, selatan Condore, selatan Bunguran, timur laut Reef North, Layang-Layang, Labuan dan Palawan sehingga 3:00 pagi; Jumaat, 26 Jun 2026.

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Saturday, 27 June 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Sabtu, 27 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Perlis ;  Kedah  (Langkawi, Kubang Pasu and Kota Setar);  Sarawak:  Kuching (Lundu and Kuching), Kapit (Belaga), Bintulu (Sebauh), Miri and Limbang;  Sabah:  Interior (Sipitang, Kuala Penyu, Beaufort and Nabawan); and  FT Labuan  until 6:00AM; Friday, 26 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Perlis ;  Kedah  (Langkawi, Kubang Pasu dan Kota Setar);  Sarawak:  Kuching (Lundu dan Kuching), Kapit (Belaga), Bintulu (Sebauh), Miri dan Limbang;  Sabah:  Pedalaman (Sipitang, Kuala Penyu, Beaufort dan Nabawan); dan  WP Labuan  sehingga 6:00 pagi; Jumaat, 26 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: No Tropical Cyclone system is observed under MMD monitoring region (Latitude: 0-20 North & Longitude: 95-130 East)
data.text_bm: Tiada sistem Siklon Tropika dicerap di dalam kawasan pemantauan MMD (Latitud: 0-20 Utara & Longitud: 95-130 Timur)
